title: Barber college defined
doc_html:
§355.  Barber college defined

As used in this Chapter, "barber college" shall include a school of barbering, college of barbering, barber school, barber college, and any other place or institution for the instruction or training of persons to engage in the practice of barbering.  

Acts 1984, No. 238, §1.
doc_text:
§355.  Barber college defined
As used in this Chapter, "barber college" shall include a school of barbering, college of barbering, barber school, barber college, and any other place or institution for the instruction or training of persons to engage in the practice of barbering.
Acts 1984, No. 238, §1.
